title: Spector emitter config
description: Standardized per-emitter selection of spector spec files to generate. Opt-in: only specs listed with a truthy value are generated.

specs.description: Map of spec path (relative to the specs root) to a selection.

oneOf.description: true = generate this spec; false = tracked skip (document why in a YAML comment).
Generate this spec once per option-set (multiple outputs).

optionSet.description: Generate this spec with custom emitter options.

options.description: Opaque map of emitter option name to value.
